person.name: Hodierne de Montlhery
person.userCertifiedLifeSummary:
HODIERNE [Ermesende] (-25 Mar ----).  The Historia of Monk Aimon names "Milonem de Brayo et Guidonem Rubeum, Comitissam quoque Reiteste, et Bonam-vecinam de Pontibus, Elizabeth etiam uxorem Joscelini de Corteciniaco, insuper dominam de Puisat, et dominam de S. Galerico" as the children of "Guidonem" and his wife[1002].  The identity of Hodierne’s husband is uncertain, but from a chronological point of view he could have been Gauthier.  The necrology of Longpont records the death "IX Kal Aug" of "Guido institutor hujus loci. Guido vicecomes; Adalaidis comitissa, uxor; Wido filius eius", a supplementary section adding a further reference to the anniversary of “donni Guidonis senioris hujus loci institutoris et Guidonis comitis filii eius...IX Kal Aug” as well as the anniversary of “donne Hodierne uxoris ipsius Guidonis senioris et Ermensendis de Sancto Galarico filie amborum...VII Kal Apr” with a reference to her visit to Cluny where “beato Hugoni abbati” gave her “calicem...aureum”[1003].  In another passage, the necrology of Longpont records the death "VIII Kal Apr" of "domine Hodierne de Sancto Galarico"[1004].  m [as his second wife, GAUTHIER Seigneur de Saint-Valéry-en-Caux, son of BERNARD [I] Seigneur de Saint-Valéry & his wife --

https://fmg.ac/Projects/MedLands/parcorroc.htm#ElisabethMontlheryMPhilippeFrance

zh.lifeSummary: 當Hodierne de Montlhery於大約1045年出生在法國i萊-德-福朗斯艾頌蒙特爾賀利時，她的父親Guy de Montlhéry I37歲，母親Hodierna de Gometz-La-Ferte42歲。她和Gauthier de Saint Valéry至少有3個兒子和1個女兒。她去世於1113年在法國崔-瓦爾 德 洛易洛易特庫尼享年69歲，埋葬在法國皮卡迪奧易。

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

en.lifeSummary: When Hodierne de Montlhery was born about 1045, in Montlhéry, Essonne, Île-de-France, France, her father, Guy de Montlhéry I, was 37 and her mother, Hodierna de Gometz-La-Ferte, was 42. She had at least 3 sons and 1 daughter with Gauthier de Saint Valéry. She died in 1113, in Courtenay, Loiret, Centre-Val de Loire, France, at the age of 69, and was buried in Oise, Picardie, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Hodierne de Montlhery est née environ 1045, à Montlhéry, Essonne, Île-de-France, France, son père, Guy de Montlhéry I, avait 37 ans et sa mère, Hodierna de Gometz-La-Ferte, avait 42 ans. Elle a eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille avec Gauthier de Saint Valéry. Elle est décédée en 1113, à Courtenay, Loiret, Centre-Val de Loire, France, à l’âge de 69 ans, et a été enterrée à Oise, Picardie, France.

Sie hatte mit Gauthier de Saint Valéry mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1113 im Alter von 69 Jahren in Courtenay, Loiret, Centre-Val de Loire, Frankreich und wurde in Oise, Picardie, Frankreich begraben.

ko.Courtenay, Loiret, Centre, France: 프랑스 세트레-발 데 로이르 로이렛 쿠르텐아이
ko.lifeSummary: Hodierne de Montlhery(이)가 대략 1045년 프랑스 i레-데-프랜스 에손 몽he리에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Guy de Montlhéry I(은)는 37세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Hodierna de Gometz-La-Ferte(은)는 42세였다. 그녀는 Gauthier de Saint Valéry(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1113년 프랑스 세트레-발 데 로이르 로이렛 쿠르텐아이에서 69세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 피카디 이스에 묻혔다.

ru.Courtenay, Loiret, Centre, France: коуртенеи, лоирет, кентре-валь де лоир, Франция
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Hodierne de Montlhery родилась около 1045 г. в местности монтлхeри, эссонн, iле-де-фрэнс, Франция, её отцу по имени Guy de Montlhéry I было 37 лет, а матери, которую звали Hodierna de Gometz-La-Ferte, 42. У неё было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь от Gauthier de Saint Valéry. Она умерла в 1113 г. в местности коуртенеи, лоирет, кентре-валь де лоир, Франция в возрасте 69 лет и была похоронена в местности оис, пикарди, Франция.
